content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Breaking Good". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/507/problem/E?locale=en
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n. The second line contains n integers a1, a2, ..., an.
content.outputFormat: The minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

hidden.label: tricky case / empty-like / negative if allowed

solution.approach: Use dynamic programming to find the minimum number of operations required to make all elements of the array equal.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
min_val = min(a)
count = sum(x - min_val for x in a)
print(count)
